rulings.Case Title: FAHIMA ZAHIR VS. 18 LANSING STREET OWNERS'S ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 25, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT 18 LANSING STREET OWNERS'S ASSOCIATION DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with final leave to amend. In her causes of action for declaratory relief and promissory estoppel Plaintiff is to (1) identify the rights to be adjudicated vis-à-vis the Association only, for which relief may be granted without any impact on the ownership rights of other members, i.e. that Association has ownership of the roof or that Association's actions or inactions are binding on the true owners; or (2) if Plaintiff cannot in good faith allege that Association is the owner, Plaintiff shall name other members as actual defendants, not nominal defendants. Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty against the Association is sustained without leave to amend. This cause of action was included without leave of Court. Additionally, Plaintiff makes no substantive opposition to the demurrer. Plaintiff's improper request (made in opposition to the demurrer) for leave to amend the complaint to allege a new cause of action for breach of fiduciary duties against the directors is DENIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP ET AL VS. MAXIMUS 620 OWNER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 25, 2018 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP, EJC FOLSOM LLC DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Cross-Complaint was provided an opportunity to allege facts in support of its contentions and Cross-Complainant failed to do so. No facts are alleged to show that e-mails exchanged by counsel created a binding written agreement and no facts alleged showing that placement of $1.5M constituted partial payment to the seller or that such placement resulted in an unjust and unconscionable loss. Cross-Complainant does not indicate which fact, if any, it can allege if leave to amend is granted again. = (501/REQ)
